description: Semantic mapping for Oracle EBS AP tables to business concepts.

tables.description: Stores header information for supplier invoices.

columns.name: INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the invoice (Primary Key).

columns.name: INVOICE_NUM
columns.description: The supplier's invoice number.

columns.name: INVOICE_DATE
columns.description: The date of the invoice.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_VENDORS (The supplier).

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_VENDOR_SITES_ALL (The supplier site).

columns.name: INVOICE_AMOUNT
columns.description: The total amount of the invoice.

columns.name: AMOUNT_PAID
columns.description: The amount paid so far on the invoice.

columns.name: INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency of the invoice (e.g., USD, EUR).

columns.name: PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG
columns.description: Status of payment (Y=Fully Paid, N=Not Paid, P=Partially Paid).

tables.description: Stores line item details for supplier invoices.

columns.name: INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to AP_INVOICES_ALL.

columns.name: LINE_NUMBER
columns.description: The line number.

columns.name: LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Type of line (ITEM, TAX, FREIGHT, MISC).

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description of the line item.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: The amount for the line item.

tables.description: Stores information about payments made to suppliers.

columns.name: CHECK_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the payment (Primary Key).

columns.name: CHECK_NUMBER
columns.description: The check or payment reference number.

columns.name: CHECK_DATE
columns.description: The date of the payment.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: The total amount of the payment.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_VENDORS (The supplier paid).

columns.name: STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Status of the payment (NEGOTIABLE, CLEARED, VOIDED).

tables.description: Stores information about suppliers (vendors). Note: Replaces PO_VENDORS in newer R12 versions, but PO_VENDORS is often a view to this.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the supplier (Primary Key).

columns.name: VENDOR_NAME
columns.description: The name of the supplier.

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: The supplier number.

tables.description: Stores addresses and site-specific information for suppliers.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the site (Primary Key).

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to AP_SUPPLIERS.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_CODE
columns.description: The name or code for the site (e.g., HEADQUARTERS, SAN_FRANCISCO).

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.description: Address line 1.

columns.name: CITY
columns.description: City.

common_joins.description: Link Invoice Header to Supplier Name
Link Invoice Header to Supplier Site

example_queries.description: Get all unpaid invoices with supplier names and amounts.
example_queries.sql: SELECT i.INVOICE_NUM, s.VENDOR_NAME, i.INVOICE_AMOUNT FROM AP_INVOICES_ALL i JOIN AP_SUPPLIERS s ON i.VENDOR_ID = s.VENDOR_ID WHERE i.PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG = 'N'

example_queries.description: Get all payments made in the last month with supplier names.
example_queries.sql: SELECT c.CHECK_NUMBER, c.CHECK_DATE, c.AMOUNT, s.VENDOR_NAME FROM AP_CHECKS_ALL c JOIN AP_SUPPLIERS s ON c.VENDOR_ID = s.VENDOR_ID WHERE c.CHECK_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1)
